design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Jump'n'Shoot through its core platformer loop.

gdd_outline.combat_notes: Combat pacing should match genre tempo and readable threat language.
constraints: Signature mechanics must reinforce genre fantasy
gdd_outline.core_loop: Platforming movement (run, jump, climb, dash, fall) while firing to manage threats and clear space.
gdd_outline.economy_notes: Tune earn/spend to genre tension targets.
gdd_outline.overview: Jump'n'Shoot is a subgenre of platformer games that doubles down on platforming while adding shooter elements. The hallmark is facing-locked shooting combined with jump cutoff, forcing players to jump to hit targets above their line of sight.
gdd_outline.progression_notes: Follow signature mechanic dependencies across early, mid, and late phases.

mechanics.expression: Hallmark mechanic; weapon aim locked to character facing direction.
mechanics.map_notes: Hallmark mechanic; weapon aim locked to character facing direction.

mechanics.expression: Hallmark mechanic; early jump release for vertical aim windows.
mechanics.map_notes: Hallmark mechanic; early jump release for vertical aim windows.

mechanics.expression: Snappy locomotion required for hazard navigation while shooting.
mechanics.map_notes: Snappy locomotion required for hazard navigation while shooting.

mechanics.expression: Baseline weapon always available without resource cost.
mechanics.map_notes: Baseline weapon always available without resource cost.

mechanics.expression: Special weapons consume ammo or energy.
mechanics.map_notes: Special weapons consume ammo or energy.

mechanics.expression: Switch between acquired weapons or abilities.
mechanics.map_notes: Switch between acquired weapons or abilities.

narrative.core_loop: Platforming movement (run, jump, climb, dash, fall) while firing to manage threats and clear space.
narrative.description: Jump'n'Shoot is a subgenre of platformer games that doubles down on platforming while adding shooter elements. The hallmark is facing-locked shooting combined with jump cutoff, forcing players to jump to hit targets above their line of sight.

pacing.early: Teach facing locked shooting with low failure cost.
pacing.late: Test full signature loop mastery under peak constraints.
pacing.mid: Combine supporting mechanics and raise resource or pattern pressure.

variants.label: Hardcore Jump'n'Shoot
variants.notes: Tighter economy and higher failure cost for experienced players.
